  • .rst

mlx.data.core.CharTrie.search

Contents

  • CharTrie.search()

mlx.data.core.CharTrie.search#

CharTrie.search(self: mlx.data._c.core.CharTrie, token: str | List[str]) → mlx.data._c.core.CharTrieNode#

Search a the passed string or list of characters in the trie and return the node or None if not found.

To get the id of a token it suffices to do:

print(trie.search("hello").id)

However, if ‘hello’ is not in the vocabulary then CharTrie.search() will return None.

Parameters:

token (str or list[char]) – The token to be searched given either as a string or a list of characters.

Returns:

The node corresponding to the token or None.

Return type:

mlx.data.core.CharTrieNode

previous

mlx.data.core.CharTrie.root

next

mlx.data.tokenizer_helpers.read_trie_from_vocab
Contents
  • CharTrie.search()
